## [00:00 - 03:02]

And this is called a four degrees of action and you're going to absolutely use this information for the rest of your life. Look, you can never take enough action in your life and it will never get you into trouble. I mean it might get you in a little trouble if you're doing it in the wrong areas but it's not going to get you into negative trouble in most cases. Taking action is the way to get out of trouble. If you've ever been in trouble you're like, what do I need to do right now? Right? If you're trying to solve a problem, what do I need to do? That's action. The only time that action will cause you trouble is when there isn't enough of it or when there isn't any. You're not going to get any production because you didn't do anything. That can get you into trouble. It's been said that there are three degrees of action in life. I don't believe that. I believe there's four. I'm going to introduce you to them now. Number one, there's the right action. I did the right thing and got the result. Number two, there's the wrong action. I did the wrong action and don't like that. Number three is no action. I took no action at all. That's a lot of people qualify for that. It will result in what? Nothing. In my world, there's this fourth action. We talked about it in a previous segment, massive action. That's the one you want to live by. The fourth action, massive action is by far the action that will prove that you get results. It will make you successful. It will allow you, no matter your skill set, it will allow you to produce. It will have a higher rate than others. That's right. That's what I said, no matter your skill rate. If a person less talented than me, say, takes 100 times more action than I take, I guarantee you they're going to wear me out. They're going to get better than me at some point and they're going to beat me in the marketplace. This fourth action, massive action, has resulted in my life and more success for me personally and in my business than any other single thing I've done. It's not how smart I was or even how trained I was or that I drilled and rehearsed. Those things are critical and I want you to do them, but look, you need to take more action. When someone asks me, what is the one thing, Grant, the one thing that you've done that made the biggest difference in your life, whether it was in your real estate career, your speaking career, your consulting business, any of the other companies, what was the one difference? Look, man, one difference. Massive action, the fourth level of action. Even when I had no clue of what I was doing, which has been often in my life, okay, I went ahead and took massive action. If I wanted to get a loan on a piece of property, I don't go to one lender. I go to three, four, five, six lenders. I never put my trust in one situation. I over massive action, I over commit to multiple choices. That way I end up with a solution. When I buy a piece of property, I don't make a bid on one piece of property. I make a bid on multiple pieces of property. I take massive action into the marketplace. I'll even use different names if I need to in order to try to buy that property to ensure

that I get it, that I have a shot at that property. You understand what I'm talking about? You got to get creative with massive action.
